title: lastrea omeiensis
intro: Lastrea omeiensis, also known as the Omei fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea omeiensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory diseases such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Omei fern are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
